title: Metro Catchment Packing: Non-Overlapping Station Reach
strategies: trivial baseline: centre each catchment disk on its platform and grow it to min(wall distance, half the distance to the nearest other platform) -- the even symmetric split
greedy water-filling: keep centres on platforms but replace the even split with coordinate-ascent water-filling, letting some disks claim a full inter-platform gap while neighbours shrink

strong push-and-refill local search: free the centres (each still covering its platform), nudge each disk into open space away from neighbours and walls, refill radii, and keep only feasibility-verified non-decreasing moves
asymmetric slack allocation: relocate small crowded disks toward voids so larger disks can absorb the freed room
